Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 94ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
41ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 40ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Validation fails when platform username is empty
15ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 14ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

Request:

    Payload:

          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"

          "status": 404,

          }

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
12ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 12ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [

            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO013 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 334ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
119ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 24ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        100.125

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "f1c5e067-d8fc-4895-87e8-5a60d2acbfc4",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.125"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "ab85c05f-07b3-471e-b0b6-0e4a07d91415",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests payment with: 15ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "e98b30d1-8e51-4eb8-892c-52ec52523b4e",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "28083746-4eb2-4782-9122-faa71d45f5b0",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

field value
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
amount -45 

Then(/^a prepared request payment fixture exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 371ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet balance by settlement amount
148ms 6

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS settles a wager with: 64ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "f84a70ae-8be4-44dc-beef-761c6d819ae0",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773985357175-owg381",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1773985357",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "2a4dd722-55c5-48e4-8659-88b986677a3d",
            "origin_order_no": "a338dc55-c76e-4f9d-9510-21a53274f2f7",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "0dc5cb6a-b54f-4252-a33a-0ccb68345e65"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2ec8a400-77c2-4d59-af29-838e16866db7"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    After:
        47.25
    Expected increase:
        11.5
    Expected:
        47.25

When APISYS settles a wager with: 41ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount -5
effective_amount -5
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": -8, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": -12, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "ecb3c5be-e2ac-4686-b4eb-4bc42f0a11b4",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773985357408-o1bbe5",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-5",
          "effective_amount": "-5",
          "settlement_time": "1773985357",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "504a9704-00d5-430e-8154-f196b0c48459",
            "origin_order_no": "f89f547a-589a-4377-ab3e-75f9e27bd12a",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "ab4073f5-2325-43e2-9abf-e691bc47dec1"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "0973f78c-5a85-48f1-96a1-37befc71777b",
              "amount": -8,
              "settlement_time": 1773985357
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "746522fa-25ea-41a0-8942-c66cc9315103",
              "amount": -12,
              "settlement_time": 1773985357
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "60d9244b-13b4-4a54-951a-1d05737c2d69"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 13ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "3ad4e134-5ce1-4d16-9b59-c545c4fa3651",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773985357539-bnslpm",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773985357",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "3f9625db-bb37-4c03-9ff9-ccc537bbb78a",
            "origin_order_no": "8ff71db4-826a-4432-b67f-def9b5405d42",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "f88d032e-5850-4b76-955f-572f14a56b2c"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

And a prepared paid wager fixture exists for: < 1ms
field value
wager_no <wager_no>
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^a prepared paid wager fixture exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO008 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO008 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

Feature:AMO009 Seamless Resettle Wager 163ms 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant resettle wager API
So that I can apply corrected settlement amounts

Resettlement increases the wallet balance

amount -4.25

          "ticket_no": "",
          "origin_wager_no": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-4.25",
          "effective_amount": "",
          "type": "1",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "3489a480-5bc0-47be-9181-417553d3a6ee",

            "origin_sub_order_no": "03c2e2d8-84d8-402d-aeec-836931bfc599"
          },

          "wager_time": "",
          "settlement_time": "1773985357",
          "is_system_reward": "false"

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 19ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 105.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        105.625

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [

        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 105.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        105.625

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 31ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 50
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "6653ee9d-37e7-49d1-83d2-7e4d1ecaf473",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "50",
          "session_id": "ca49c2e2-e672-4a79-8bf9-196ef72976df"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "42c58ed6-0768-4315-8799-5ddeebc724ee",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "6653ee9d-37e7-49d1-83d2-7e4d1ecaf473",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "50",
          "session_id": "ca49c2e2-e672-4a79-8bf9-196ef72976df"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "42c58ed6-0768-4315-8799-5ddeebc724ee",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo010_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    amo010_reference_id:
        42c58ed6-0768-4315-8799-5ddeebc724ee

Info 

Stored:
    amo010_reference_id:
        42c58ed6-0768-4315-8799-5ddeebc724ee

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 50 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        105.625
    After:
        155.625
    Expected increase:
        50
    Expected:
        155.625

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 17ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "11bd0b07-b8e3-4907-a0a9-980d8061020b",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "1aec6171-d4d2-4c9c-b4df-c01d1054d875"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "11bd0b07-b8e3-4907-a0a9-980d8061020b",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "1aec6171-d4d2-4c9c-b4df-c01d1054d875"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,

            "error": [

                "message": "Amount must be a positive number"

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 555ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
88ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 15ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 37ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "353f221c-e92f-451d-96c9-5d552293da74",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "db5805f0-1a5a-4fc7-ade0-89f602a0a0d6"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d1b65f55-10f3-4917-88a4-ee37025b851a",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "353f221c-e92f-451d-96c9-5d552293da74",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "db5805f0-1a5a-4fc7-ade0-89f602a0a0d6"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d1b65f55-10f3-4917-88a4-ee37025b851a",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        175.625
    After:
        155.125
    Expected decrease:
        20.5
    Expected:
        155.125

Info

          ]
        }
    Response:

              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

                "CNY": 155.125

field value

session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "387bc646-283d-419b-a968-e6ee30ab5864",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "13f22ec1-a456-4095-ab10-039ef47b35d5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "38b4ad7e-6ad1-4c63-b883-3fd2930b477f",

              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"

        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "387bc646-283d-419b-a968-e6ee30ab5864",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "13f22ec1-a456-4095-ab10-039ef47b35d5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "38b4ad7e-6ad1-4c63-b883-3fd2930b477f",
              "amount": -15,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        38b4ad7e-6ad1-4c63-b883-3fd2930b477f

Info 

Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        38b4ad7e-6ad1-4c63-b883-3fd2930b477f

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 18ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 140.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        155.125
    After:
        140.125
    Expected decrease:
        15
    Expected:
        140.125

          "transfer_no": "387bc646-283d-419b-a968-e6ee30ab5864",

          "body": {
            "code": 200,

              "reference_id": "38b4ad7e-6ad1-4c63-b883-3fd2930b477f",

            },

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 15ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 10ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "1c28c13f-9017-4225-a63d-f94631b035e9",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "f641592d-d959-491d-b20c-787ab53b9e0f"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

Validation fails when platform_username is missing
11ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 10ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
currency <currency>
amount -10
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "36d595c3-74ba-48d2-9a5d-7f1d35671325",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-10",
          "session_id": "3e050425-8adf-44fe-acf1-a2d88ddde0dc"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is required"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 250ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
119ms 9

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 43ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8cfa3d2e-8cf2-416a-89e9-5feee01e940e",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "eedb8f9f-9a76-4242-84bc-c6116cb86271"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "6cff78c3-2f03-4cbe-8517-926935a20f09",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8cfa3d2e-8cf2-416a-89e9-5feee01e940e",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "eedb8f9f-9a76-4242-84bc-c6116cb86271"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "6cff78c3-2f03-4cbe-8517-926935a20f09",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

transfer_no <transfer_no>
Show Info +

    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8cfa3d2e-8cf2-416a-89e9-5feee01e940e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "920e297c-ecd4-4bf0-a082-a25f7670c133"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

reference_id any non-empty value

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer out and is idempotent
98ms 10

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 26ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        0.125

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 7 4

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
